items.name: ERNIE-Image
items.description: ERNIE-Image is an open text-to-image generation model developed by the ERNIE-Image team at Baidu. It is built on a single-stream Diffusion Transformer (DiT), with only 8B DiT parameters, it reaches state-of-the-art performance among open-weight text-to-image models.

items.name: Mem-RAG
items.description: 这是一个基于 LangChain 和 Milvus 的 RAG（检索增强生成）混合检索系统，结合了向量检索和关键词检索的优势，通过语义分割和 RRF 融合策略提高了检索效果。系统架构清晰，功能完善，适合作为中小型知识库问答系统的基础框架。
